scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.demo: npm run demo:build && npm run demo:start
scripts.demo:build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.demo:start: cd backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server.js
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
